templates.name: 1DevTool Landing Template
templates.description: Next.js landing page adapted from the 1DevTool launch page structure, with a single config file and a replaceable product screenshot.

templates.name: Landing - AI SaaS
templates.description: Premium AI workspace landing with chat-demo dashboard, gradient glows, multi-section flow, and pricing. Built for AI products like Aether — a StoicSoft brand.

templates.name: Landing - Developer Tool
templates.description: Terminal-aesthetic landing for developer tools, CLIs, and template marketplaces. Inspired by 1DevTool — open-source registry of production-grade Next.js templates.

templates.name: Landing - Server Monitoring
templates.description: Infrastructure / uptime monitoring landing with live status dashboard, world map, alerts, and pricing. Inspired by ServerCompass — a StoicSoft product.

templates.name: Landing - Personal Portfolio
templates.description: Editorial cream-and-serif portfolio for a one-person studio or freelancer. Bento work grid, services, journal, now-page, and warm contact CTA.

templates.name: Landing - Mobile App
templates.description: Consumer mobile-app showcase with phone mockups, vibrant gradient hero, App Store and Google Play CTAs, reviews, and pricing.

templates.name: Landing - Ecommerce Product
templates.description: Minimalist physical-product launch landing with hero shot, craft section, reviews, and a checkout summary card. Cream-and-ink editorial aesthetic.

templates.name: Landing - Restaurant
templates.description: Warm restaurant / cafe landing with menu, hours, press quotes, and a built-in reservation form. Italic display serif on cream paper.

templates.name: Landing - Fitness Studio
templates.description: Cinematic dark fitness landing with running marquee, programs grid, schedule table, coaches grid, testimonials, and membership pricing.

templates.name: Landing - Fintech App
templates.description: Premium navy fintech landing with animated dashboard mockup, live ticker, bento product showcase, security badges, and pricing tiers.

templates.name: Landing - Creative Agency
templates.description: Editorial cream agency landing with oversized display serif, asymmetric bento work grid, numbered services, dark process card, and warm CTA.

templates.name: Landing - SaaS Analytics
templates.description: SaaS analytics landing with dashboard hero, metric breakdown, integrations, pricing, and FAQ.

templates.name: Landing - Podcast Show
templates.description: Audio-first podcast landing with animated player card, waveform episode list, host bios, subscribe platforms, and membership CTA. Inspired by Signal FM — a StoicSoft production.

templates.name: Landing - Newsletter / Publication
templates.description: Editorial newspaper-style newsletter landing with masthead, current issue excerpt, archive, about page, and subscribe form. Cream paper aesthetic.

templates.name: Landing - Tech Conference
templates.description: Bold tech-event landing with oversized display type, speakers grid, two-day schedule, venue info, sponsors, and tiered tickets. Inspired by Shipped /2026.

templates.name: Landing - Real Estate
templates.description: Photography-led property brokerage landing with listings grid, region blocks, services, testimonials, and inquiry form. Warm cream editorial palette.

templates.name: Landing - Law Firm
templates.description: Navy-and-gold boutique law firm landing with practice areas, partner bios, selected matters, testimonials, and consultation form. Playfair display.

templates.name: Landing - Travel / Tours
templates.description: Warm small-group-travel landing with postcard trip cards, sample itinerary, rules of how we travel, traveller stories, and booking. Tenor Sans + Instrument Serif.

templates.name: Landing - Web3 / Crypto
templates.description: Non-custodial payment rail landing with cyberpunk neon glows, animated payroll dashboard, live ticker, chains grid, tokenomics, and roadmap.

templates.name: Landing - Nonprofit
templates.description: Mission-driven reforestation nonprofit landing with live sapling counter, impact stats, field stories, donation tiers, and volunteer signup. Warm moss palette.

templates.name: Landing - Online Course / Cohort
templates.description: Six-week cohort course landing with curriculum cards, what's-included bento, instructor bios, graduate stories, and enrol form. Bricolage Grotesque display.

templates.name: Simple Next.js Blog
templates.description: Full-featured blog with markdown posts, syntax highlighting, and RSS.

templates.name: Blog - Editorial Magazine
templates.description: Newspaper-style culture magazine with masthead, featured cover story, three-column lead stories, columns grid, sidebar, and excerpt with dropcap. Warm cream paper aesthetic with Fraunces serif.

templates.name: Blog - Developer / Engineering
templates.description: Dark monospace developer blog with terminal navigation, syntax-highlighted Go code block, posts list with tag chips, sidebar with tags + series, and developer-focused subscribe panel. Geist + Geist Mono.

templates.name: Blog - Photo Journal
templates.description: Dark minimal photographer's journal with mosaic feature plates, 3-column plate grid, about section with equipment list, prints showcase, and Sunday-feed subscribe. Painterly gradient placeholders for photos.

templates.name: Blog - Long-form Essay
templates.description: Paper-style long-form essay blog with Crimson Pro serif, masthead, featured essay with dropcap, year-grouped Roman-numeral archive, reading log, and quiet author bio. Built for the kind of writing that takes 24 minutes.

templates.name: Blog - Personal Garden
templates.description: Multi-section digital-garden personal blog with essays, notes, links, bookshelf (with rendered spines), /now page, and projects. iA Writer Quattro + Source Serif. The unhurried, internet-as-it-was variety.

templates.name: Document - Product Docs
templates.description: Elegant GitBook-style product documentation starter with markdown pages, generated sidebars, page outlines, search chrome, and original 1DevTool copy.

templates.name: Document - API Reference
templates.description: Markdown API reference starter with endpoint pages, generated navigation, right-side TOC, code blocks, and ServerCompass developer copy.

templates.name: Document - Operations Runbook
templates.description: Markdown runbook documentation starter for incident response, alerts, postmortems, and escalation policies with ServerCompass operations copy.

templates.name: Directory - SaaS Tools
templates.description: Dark curated-tools directory with JSON data loading, category chips, featured bento, item detail pages, and submission form. StoicSoft-branded with ServerCompass and 1DevTool features.

templates.name: Directory - Developer Starters
templates.description: Terminal-aesthetic code registry directory with paper-grid background, monospace accents, CLI install commands, and GitHub-style detail pages. 1DevTool-style.

templates.name: Directory - Indie Makers
templates.description: Editorial cream-and-serif directory of independent makers with profile grid, hand-drawn dividers, and roster pages. Fraunces serif, warm paper aesthetic.

templates.name: Directory - Startup Jobs
templates.description: Light-theme engineering job board with honest salary bands, location + remote filters, indigo-to-emerald gradient accents, and paid-posting flow.

templates.name: Directory - Design Resources
templates.description: Visual shelf-style directory for fonts, icons, UI kits, and objects. Cream + vibrant gradients, large card previews, serif display headings.

templates.name: Directory - API Catalog
templates.description: Dark developer-friendly API directory with HTTP method badges, sample endpoint preview, rate/auth fields, and cURL snippet on detail pages.

templates.name: Directory - AI Tools
templates.description: Neon purple-and-cyan AI tool atlas with strength/weakness rating pairs, curator confidence bars, and a “four-week test” review format.

templates.name: Directory - Newsletters
templates.description: Cream paper newsstand with Newsreader serif, masthead chrome, feature tiles, and issue-archive detail pages. Quarterly-magazine feel.

templates.name: Directory - Agencies & Studios
templates.description: Sophisticated navy-and-gold agency directory with Playfair Display serif, rate card sidebars, reference-call submission flow, and quiet studio detail pages.

templates.name: Directory - Podcasts
templates.description: Dark podcast rotation with animated equalizer bars, cover-art cards, episode preview sidebar, and Space Grotesk + Instrument Serif type pair.

templates.name: SaaS Control Plane
templates.description: Next.js SaaS starter with dashboard, auth and billing seams, custom-domain onboarding, and Cloudflare DNS setup docs.

templates.name: Desktop App
templates.description: Electron + React desktop application starter.
